memoryArtifacts.headline: Wikipedia Entry
memoryArtifacts.description:
Manasses was Earl of Omont and the first Earl of Rethel during the second half of the tenth century

The Annals Hanoniæ say it son of a Gautier, Duke of Alsace, but this mention appears as fanciful. …

popularStory.headline: Wikipedia Entry
popularStory.description:
Manasses was Earl of Omont and the first Earl of Rethel during the second half of the tenth century

The Annals Hanoniæ say it son of a Gautier, Duke of Alsace, but this mention appears as fanciful. …

zh.Rethel, Champagne-Ardenne, France: 法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾

zh.Champagne, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France: 法國努維勒-阿吉泰道多哈帕格-吉方泰
zh.lifeSummary: 當Manasses de Rethel III於大約1022年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾時，他的父親Manasses de Rethel73歲，母親Dada54歲。他和Judith de Roucy至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1080年在他的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Fra: 法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Manasses de Rethel III于大约1022年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾时，他的父亲Manasses de Rethel73岁，母亲Dada54岁。他和Judith de Roucy至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1080年在他的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rethel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: South German: probably a nickname for a fleet footed, slender person, from a diminutive of Middle High German rēch ‘deer’ with the diminutive form being more frequent in earlier time.

en.lifeSummary: When Manasses de Rethel III was born about 1022, in Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Manasses de Rethel, was 73 and his mother, Dada, was 54. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Judith de Roucy. He died about 1080, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Manasses de Rethel III est né environ 1022, à Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Manasses de Rethel, avait 73 ans et sa mère, Dada, avait 54 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Judith de Roucy. Il est décédé environ 1080, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Manasses de Rethel III um 1022 in Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Manasses de Rethel 73 und seine Mutter Dada 54. Er hatte mit Judith de Roucy mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1080 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Manasses de Rethel III è nato il circa 1022 nel Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Manasses de Rethel, aveva 73 anni e il suo madre, Dada, aveva 54 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Judith de Roucy. Morì circa 1080, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.Rethel, Champagne-Ardenne, France: フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスレスエル

ja.lifeSummary: Manasses de Rethel IIIが約1022年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスレスエルで生まれた時，父Manasses de Rethelは73歳，母Dadaは54歳であった。彼はJudith de Roucyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1080年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Manasses de Rethel III(이)가 대략 1022년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 레테에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Manasses de Rethel(은)는 73세였고, 그의 어머니 Dada(은)는 54세였다. 그는 Judith de Roucy(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1080년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1022–about 1080: tany ho any amin'ny 1022–tany ho any amin'ny 1080

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Manasses de Rethel III nasceu aproximadamente 1022, em Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Manasses de Rethel, tinha 73 anos e sua mãe, Dada, tinha 54 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Judith de Roucy. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1080, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Manasses de Rethel III родился около 1022 г. в местности ретел, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Manasses de Rethel было 73 года, а матери, которую звали Dada, 54. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Judith de Roucy. Он умер около 1080 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

sm.about 1022–about 1080: e tusa o le 1022–e tusa o le 1080

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Manasses de Rethel III nació aproximadamente 1022, en Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Manasses de Rethel, tenía 73 años y su mamá, Dada, tenía 54 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Judith de Roucy. Murió aproximadamente 1080, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
